core_mechanism: a flat (zero-curvature) connection on the tangent bundle of a deformation/moduli space, whose parallel transport propagates local data at one point across the whole family so that every global quantity is reconstructed by integrating this integrable connection
brief_reason: The abstract builds a moduli space M whose tangent space is the space of observables and equips its tangent bundle with a flat quantum connection that determines all correlation functions of the family, i.e. an integrable zero-curvature connection over a deformation space.
